scripts.package: docker build . -t kitgrail-linux-amd64 --platform linux/amd64 && docker save -o kitgrail-linux-amd64.tar kitgrail-linux-amd64
scripts.containerised: npm run build && npm run compose
scripts.installs: npm install && npm run install-auth && npm run install-kit-listing && npm run install-wishlist && npm run install-cart && npm run install-shopper && npm run install-seller-backend && npm run install-seller-frontend && npm run install-admin
scripts.cis: npm install && npm run ci-auth && npm run ci-kit-listing && npm run ci-wishlist && npm run ci-cart && npm run ci-shopper && npm run ci-seller-backend && npm run ci-seller-frontend && npm run ci-admin
scripts.build: npm run build-auth && npm run build-kit-listing && npm run build-wishlist && npm run build-cart && npm run build-shopper && npm run build-seller-backend && npm run build-seller-frontend-container && npm run build-admin
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start-auth" "npm run start-kit-listing" "npm run start-wishlist" "npm run start-cart" "npm run start-shopper" "npm run start-seller-backend" "npm run start-seller-frontend" "npm run start-admin"
scripts.start-container: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start-nginx" "npm run start-auth" "npm run start-kit-listing" "npm run start-wishlist" "npm run start-cart" "npm run start-shopper-container" "npm run start-seller-backend" "npm run start-admin-container"
